label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Alice is dancing with at the end of the song. So there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a specific partner: Alice with Jamie, Bob with Patrick, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Melissa, and Eve with Rodrigo. Now, during the song, they swap partners several times. Let me go through each swap step by step. First, Dave and Bob switch partners. So initially, Dave is with Melissa and Bob is with Patrick. After the first swap, Dave will be with Patrick and Bob will be with Melissa. Let me note that down: 1. Dave ↔ Bob: - Dave's partner: Patrick - Bob's partner: Melissa Second, Claire and Dave switch partners. Initially, Claire is with Ophelia and Dave is with Patrick. After this swap, Claire will be with Patrick and Dave will be with Ophelia. Let me update that: 2. Claire ↔ Dave: - Claire's partner: Patrick - Dave's partner: Ophelia Third, Eve and Alice switch partners. Initially, Eve is with Rodrigo and Alice is with Jamie. After this swap, Eve will be with Jamie and Alice will be with Rodrigo. Let me note that: 3. Eve ↔ Alice: - Eve's partner: Jamie - Alice's partner: Rodrigo Fourth, Claire and Eve switch partners. At this point, Claire is with Patrick and Eve is with Jamie. After the swap, Claire will be with Jamie and Eve will be with Patrick. Let me update: 4. Claire ↔ Eve: - Claire's partner: Jamie - Eve's partner: Patrick Fifth, Alice and Eve switch partners. Now, Alice is with Rodrigo and Eve is with Patrick. After this final swap, Alice will be with Patrick and Eve will be with Rodrigo. 5.
